name: Reuben Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb sliced corned beef (can be from the deli), diced into small bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a large serving amount of instant mashed potatoes according to package instructions, or use fresh mashed potatoes (about 6-8 servings).
2. Mix in the sauerkraut to taste.
3. In a large, buttered casserole dish, spread half of the potato mixture.
4. Layer the corned beef on top of the potato mixture.
5. Add the Swiss cheese on top of the corned beef.
6. Cover with the remaining potato mixture.
7. Sprinkle Paprika or Caraway seeds on top.
8. Bake in the oven for 30 minutes at 350°F.
